name: passive awareness: surface cue does not auto-create clue

source.purpose: Verifies that passive awareness delivery is only Narrator context; it does not create durable clues without Archivist extraction.

passiveAwarenessCues.surfaceText: A service hatch beside the intake counter has fresh scrape marks around the latch.

input.playerInput: Study the counter before asking for the file.

narrator.prose: Fresh scrape marks catch the light around the service hatch beside the counter, close enough to matter and ordinary enough that nobody on staff looks at it.

narratorMessages.playerInput: Study the counter before asking for the file.
userMessageContainsAll: service hatch beside the intake counter has fresh scrape marks
